case_title: SELLICK, BRENT L. VS WEBB, ALBERT A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SELLICK, BRENT L. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBB, ALBERT A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBB, ALBERT A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO ALBERT WEBB RETURNED, NOT KNOWN.
